homeaboutgallery

Hi!

I’m David and I like to take pictures in my free time. I work as a DevOps Engineer in Switzerland. I like to spend as much Time outside as possible. The photographs on this site were taken with a mixture of cameras. Most of them analog. Currently, I use the following kit:

  • Chamonix F2 4x5 with the following lenses: Fujinon 90mm, Nikkor 180mm, Nikkor 360mm
  • Bronica SQ
  • Olympus XA
  • Fujifilm X100F

Most of photographs are taken around Switzerland. A few are from Scandinavia or further away (From me at least :P).

A few books I like for various reasons, in no particular order:

  • The Lord of the Rings, J.R.R. Tolkien
  • Wie der Berg zu seinem Namen kam, Andrea Schorta
  • Dune, Frank Herbert
  • The Complete Robot, Isaac Asimov
  • Die Zürcher Bibel
  • The Wheel of Time Series, Robert Jordan
  • Utvandrarna, Vilhelm Moberg
